## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] No real secrets, keys, cookies, tokens, or private data
- [ ] New/changed Skills include `name` and `description` metadata
- [ ] Profile/domain changes include routing or eval updates when relevant
- [ ] Report changes still generate `reports/report-output.html`

## Charter alignment

Explain how this change preserves the original goal of the framework.

## Dependency / reuse decision

If a dependency or external GitHub/open-source solution was added, explain why it is safer or more useful than custom code.
